channel.title: Programming on Javier Sempere
channel.description: Recent content in Programming on Javier Sempere

item.title: How to create a simple Python project
item.description:
In this post I’d like to write down the steps to make the simplest Python project you could make. Mainly focused for research projects (e.g. people in academia). Therefore, there will be no pipelines (like Github Actions or Jenkins), nor any docs.

Version control

Let’s say you have created your local directory: mkdir my-project. First, you need to init the version control. As of today, the most used tool is git.
